title: Music of the Night
overview:
S1, Ep1

10 Oct. 2011 Music of the Night

Toki discovers a MP3 Player on a girl's dressing table and decides to entertain himself much to the discomfort of the other Canimals.

title: Pool Cans
overview: It's a hot day and the Canimals decide that turning the sink into a swimming pool will be a good way to deal with the heat and relieve their boredom.

title: Cans vs Shell
overview: FIZZY's desire for a sparkly ring combined with clumsiness ends up in him testing his abilities in a hand to claw confrontation with a hermit crab.

title: Toki in Love
overview: Toki finds a new friend and Mimi tries to break them up. Every time she tries to sabotage the new couple her efforts only bring them closer together.

title: Uly and the Apple
overview: Uly finds an apple tree and he must use all his guile to get an apple and outwit Pow. But apples have an unpleasant side-effect for hungry Uly.

title: Paint Cans
overview: Mimi decides that she will be the topic of art, when the results of the other Canimals inspiration are not to her liking; a 'messy' conflict ensues.

title: Supercan
overview: Fizzy inspired by a TV show decides to imitate the starring superhero. How difficult is it to find real adventure with villains or damsels to save?

title: Kiss and Make Up
overview: The Canimals decide to have a fashion show, which Mimi is intent on winning. But the competition gets tough when a 'fabulous' new Canimal turns up.

title: Mistake Can ID
overview: Mimi's trapped in a vending machine and Uly has to find a way to rescue her. Time is running out and Uly has a budget. Can he do the right thing?

title: School Pet
overview: At home Nia makes friends with the school goldfish. While hungry Uly is intent on making a meal of the school pet - can Nia save her new friend?

title: Rocket Cans
overview: Ato & Toki's ball game comes to an end when Pow puts the ball up high. After witnessing a human open a dropped can they come up with the perfect plan.

title: Snow Cans
overview: The Canimals find themselves racing for their lives, pursued by an ever-growing ball of snow. Will they manage to get themselves out of this intact?

title: Can't Blame Me
overview: A cute Canimal shows up and Nia and Mimi look after it but all is not as it seems. Can Ato convince them of its real intent and protect the pet bird?

title: Can Eats Can
overview: A vending machine filled with candy looks paradise, but does getting to the treats through a mechanic maze mean Uly takes on more than he can chew.

title: Canned Nuts
overview: Toki & Ato leave Nia and go on a quest for shinny trinkets. The pyramid of nuts they discover belongs to tribe of little Canimals and their big boss.

title: Can Napper
overview: Uly gets trapped inside a suitcase. Mimi and Woo-Ang need to save him and end up traveling all over the city. But does Uly want to be saved?

title: Sleeprolling Can
overview: Mimi's sleepwalking is somehow triggered by sneezing and Nia ends up spending the night watching over, and suffering while caring about Mimi's safety.

title: Wasp
overview: POW finds a tasty treat, rather than share it he makes an enemy the angry wasp. The wasp decides to teach POW a lesson and an aerial dogfight ensues.

title: Baby Doll
overview: Mimi & Nia curiosity leads them to save what they think is a baby in a runaway pram, they then try to reunite it with a mother and daughter.

title: Canimalism
overview: The Canimals get free reign of the house for a week, their initial delight turns to despair as they discover there is nothing left for them to eat.

title: Encanted
overview: While hiding from the family's pet dog, Toki and Nia discover a magician's case and maybe a solution - with some unexpected side-effects.

title: Egg Roll
overview: Pow gets all maternal when he sees an egg; Leon decides the same egg would be a great meal. Can Pow protect his baby or will he crack under pressure?

title: Shiny Cans
overview: When Oz is excluded from playing with Nia & Mimi, she decides to get them back. Outnumbered, she bribes strong but stupid Uly to act on her behalf.

title: Dolly Disaster
overview: When Nia's annoying dolly causes a fight the toy ends up well and truly out of the Canimals reach. Oz and Ato decide to get it back for her.

title: Can of the Castle
overview: Mimi finding herself stranded outside the walls of her giant sandcastle prepares an all out assault on the fortress to teach Oz and Uly a lesson.

title: Doppel Canner
overview: Leon bullied out of his share of cereal comes up with a plan to 'masquerade' as Mimi. One Mimi is bad enough, what happens when there are two them?

title: Ants & Cans
overview: While enjoying a family's picnic Fizzy, Uly and Toki torment some small ants who try to join in the ants retaliate and coordinated an ultimate attack.

title: Vase
overview: The Canimals decide that they want to have Nia's lollipop, a chase ends up with them all trapped in glass vase and a standoff for the candy begins.

title: Can Oodling
overview: Mimi falls in love with a 'Wedding Day Will' doll and doesn't want to share him with anyone else. Will she get 'Wedding Day Will's hand in marriage?

title: Can did Camera
overview: Nia sets about trying to 'rescue' Uly from his frozen prison when she becomes convinced that he is trapped inside a camera after she takes a picture.

title: Leave Me a Gnome
overview: Nia and Mimi's sunbathing is interrupted when they are terrorized by a smiling garden gnome. Is it just the one, and who is putting it up to this?

title: Can-Ouflage
overview: Fizzy has to come up with an ingenious plan to infiltrate Mimi's tea party unnoticed, so he can eat more of than his share of chocolate muffin 'cake'.

title: Bully Cans
overview: Toki and Oz put Nia in a cupboard and she discovers a remote control robot which she uses to teach a lesson on the Canimals who've been bullying her.

title: Trapped Can
overview: After eating leftovers at the café Uly gets stuck inside a cup. Ato and the rest of Canimals have to find a way to free him from his porcelain prison.

title: Once Upon a Can
overview: While a mother reads a story to her daughter, Mimi falls asleep and has a 'vivid dream' based on the fairytale. Will Mimi be rescued from her tower?

title: Can Can Fly
overview: Toki and balloon equals bouncing like being on the moon. His antics with Uly leaves Mimi all tangled and all three Canimals embark on an air born journey.

title: Skater Can
overview: The Canimals discover an abandoned roller-skate, they decide to ride about on it for fun. Oz decides she wants to have the skate all for herself.

title: Heavy Jelly
overview: Toki dives into a bowl of blue and takes a swim and everything is fun until it sets with him trapped inside. Now the other Canimals have to save him.

title: Chili Can Carnage
overview: The Canimals discover some cold leftovers and fiery chilies. Oz feeds the chilies to Koby the turtle; things begin to heat up for all the Canimals.

title: Trash Can
overview: Sick Ato finds comfort with a new friend he finds in the trash. Mimi and Fizzy think Ato's new friendship stinks and they do something about it.

title: Can Zilla
overview: What can jump like Toki's, sonic scream like Nia, has Leon's whipping tongue and Pow's ability to fly? Give up? Oz is about to find out.

title: Mousetak Can
overview: When the humans mistake the Canimals mess, they return with whole lot of mouse and rat traps. The Canimals gladly welcome the new buffet of Cheese.

title: Mama Can
overview: At a bakery, the Canimals pop out one after the other to check out a cake that somehow resembles their mother, but how can it look like all their mums?

title: Classroom
overview: The Canimals pop up and explore a classroom. Ato discovers the class pet fish and it can do everything the Canimals can do expect for one thing.

title: Coffee Cans
overview: Outside on a cold day the Canimals discover a half-filled cup of coffee radiating warmth. Mimi wants it all to herself and has to outwit the others.

title: Can Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
overview: Pow has fallen in love with a cuckoo bird and no matter what he brings to woo her she goes back inside her home. Leon finds Pow's rejection hilarious.

title: Wild Can
overview: Oz's playfulness accidentally sets of a small chain of events that displeases Capri the king of the garden and he goes on mini rampage.

title: Mimi's Birthday
overview: Mimi decides that a girls birthday party must be for her and will do everything in her power to defend the chocolate cake from the Uly and his gang.

title: Vacuum Can
overview: The Canimals make a mess in a hotel room, and Uly discovers that it sucks when something takes your food. Fizzy and Leon end up having to rescue Uly.

title: King Can
overview: In a warehouse, the Canimals accidentally knock over a box of bananas and discover Wooga an enormous Gorilla Canimal who takes a liking to Nia.

title: Canimal Magnetism
overview: Fridge magnets + Ato = Leon has fun. Leon then finds himself pursued by Ato who has become increasingly attractive to the kitchen pots and utensils.

title: Florence Nighting Can
overview: Mimi and Nia get the idea to play doctors and nurses on the toys in the hospital waiting room their enthusiasm begins to spread and no one can escape.
